message:
feat(gateway): Add flywheel.config.ts configuration support

Implement configuration service with multi-layer precedence:
1. Environment variables (highest)
2. Project config (CWD/flywheel.config.ts)
3. User config (~/.config/flywheel/config.ts)
4. Defaults (lowest)

Features:
- Zod schema validation with typed sections
- Deep merge for nested configuration
- Structured logging of loaded sources
- Clear error messages for validation failures

Sections: server, database, agent, security, websocket, analytics

Closes flywheel_gateway-6c3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
